curation_notes: Patch commit is the squash-merge of PR #2206 into master. Only one source file changed (futures-task/src/waker.rs), adding a 'static bound to the generic parameter W in the waker() function. The sibling file waker_ref.rs was examined but its waker_ref() function returns a lifetime-bounded WakerRef<'_>, so the use-after-free does not apply there. Vulnerability class use-after-free (CWE-416) is correct as confirmed by the advisory description and the nature of the fix.
